name: SecurityScorecard API
description:
REST API for the SecurityScorecard platform: manage portfolios, companies, scores, findings, and integrations.

This documentation is built from two kinds of sources.

## Internal API docs (`servicesWithInternalApiDocs`)

Specs are fetched at runtime from other microservices/repositories. Those sections are dynamic and reflect the live specs exposed by each service.

- [audit](https://users.prod.ssc.camp/api-docs)
- [authentication-policies](https://users.prod.ssc.camp/api-docs)
- [eval](https://eval.prod.ssc.camp/api-docs)
- [feedback](https://measurements.prod.ssc.camp/api-docs)
- [fluxus](https://fluxus-rest-api.prod.ssc.camp/docs/fluxus.json)
- [footprint](https://footprint.prod.ssc.camp/api-docs)
- [managed-services](https://users.prod.ssc.camp/api-docs)
- [max](https://max-api.prod.ssc.camp/api-docs)
- [measurements](https://measurements.prod.ssc.camp/api-docs)
- [plans](https://plans.prod.ssc.camp/api-docs)
- [subscriptions](https://subscriptions.prod.ssc.camp/api-docs)
- [users](https://users.prod.ssc.camp/api-docs)
- [zzzzzz](https://users.prod.ssc.camp/api-docs)

## External API docs (`servicesWithExternalApiDocs`)

Specs are bundled in this repository (local Swagger 2.0 files or static definitions). They are versioned and maintained here rather than fetched from elsewhere.
